title: The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant – 26g, Poison-Free Paste in Squeezy Tube, Use to Re-Bait Traps, Safe-to-Use Around Children and Pets (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
EASY-TO-USE: 26g tube will re-bait up to 60 traps with minimal effort, just squeeze a small amount onto the trap
EFFECTIVE: Increases catch rates in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps
SCREW TOP LID: Store any unused attractant within the tube to keep fresh between uses
DURABLE: Sweet and sticky, can’t be easily removed from the trap
POISON-FREE: Humane food-grade ingredients with prune taste
SAFE: Suitable to use around children and pets

Stays fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions. This rat trap kit effectively controls rodent infestations indoors and out. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. Compact, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid to help protect children and pets from contact with bait (not included). Designed for use with all types of bait. Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
